## Summary

Describe the change and the evidence type: proxy, simulator, emulator, or physical hardware.

## Safe verification

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_repository.py`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy src tests`
- [ ] No credentials, private identifiers, or large temporary artifacts are included
- [ ] No provider credits were spent by automated checks
- [ ] Scientific claims match committed evidence and limitations
